title: Scrollable Tab
description: Small fabric mod to support scrolling player list UI
body:
Mod that supports scrolling (with mousewheel) in the tab/player list overlay. This is helpful in servers with large playercounts.

Ports to different minecraft version will be considered upon request (please submit an issue to the github page), but ports to different modloaders are not being considered (if you want to fork and implement support for different modloaders however, I'll merge your pr). Please mention me in the github issue.

Compatibility requests will also be considered upon request.
